'''bazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nuttily|nuttily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nuttily|nuttily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bazhate|bazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bazhatesher|bazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhatesherĂ«m|bazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazhatero|bazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bazhateshĂ«|bazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhateshĂ«m|bazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazhatero|gokibazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibazhateshĂ«|gokibazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhateshĂ«m|gokibazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobazhankerom|gobazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobazhankeshĂ«|gobazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazhankeshĂ«m|gobazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobazhankeya|gobazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazhaterom|bazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhatemu|bazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bazhateya|bazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazhaterom|gokibazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhatemu|gokibazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibazhateya|gokibazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bazhazhate|bazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bazhazhatesher|bazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhazhatesherĂ«m|bazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazhazhatero|bazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bazhazhateshĂ«|bazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhazhateshĂ«m|bazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazhazhatero|gokibazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibazhazhateshĂ«|gokibazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhazhateshĂ«m|gokibazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobazhazhankerom|gobazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobazhazhankeshĂ«|gobazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazhazhankeshĂ«m|gobazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobazhazhankeya|gobazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bazhazhaterom|bazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhazhatemu|bazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bazhazhateya|bazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibazhazhaterom|gokibazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhazhatemu|gokibazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibazhazhateya|gokibazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠte|bĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠtesher|bĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠtero|bĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokibĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠterom|bĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠtemu|bĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠzhĂŠteya|bĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokibĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokibĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafzhafte|bafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafzhaftesher|bafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafzhaftesherĂ«m|bafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafzhaftero|bafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafzhafteshĂ«|bafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafzhafteshĂ«m|bafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafzhaftero|gokibafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafzhafteshĂ«|gokibafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafzhafteshĂ«m|gokibafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafzhafnkerom|gobafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafzhafnkeshĂ«|gobafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gobafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafzhafnkeya|gobafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafzhafterom|bafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafzhaftemu|bafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafzhafteya|bafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafzhafterom|gokibafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafzhaftemu|gokibafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafzhafteya|gokibafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
